title: fumaria sepium subsp. rugosa
intro: Fumaria sepium subsp. rugosa, also known as the rough-fruited fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Fumaria sepium subsp. rugosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Fumaria sepium subsp. rugosa can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
